sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95714" key="spanadelfi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σπᾰνᾰδελφ-ία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n95714.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fewness of brothers</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sisters</tr_>, ibid., Antigonus in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.71</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
